    @pytest.mark.ddt
    def test_payment_gateways(page, checkout, payment_data):
        # 1. Robust Navigation with Retry Logic
        for attempt in range(3):
            try:
                page.goto("https://automationexercise.com/payment", wait_until="networkidle", timeout=30000)
                break
            except Exception as e:
                if attempt == 2:
                    raise e
                page.wait_for_timeout(2000)  # Short breather before retrying
    
        # 2. Action
        checkout.complete_payment(
            name=payment_data['name'],
            card=payment_data['card_no'],
            cvc=payment_data['cvc'],
            month=payment_data['month'],
            year=payment_data['year']
